message:
fix: two more bugs from second review pass

1. parse_checksum_result falsely reported matches=true when the
   installer failed for non-checksum reasons (e.g., download error
   with exit code 22). Now returns None for non-zero non-99 exits
   to indicate checksum status is unknown.

2. Docker curl installation step had no timeout — a slow apt mirror
   could hang the test indefinitely before reaching the actual
   timeout-wrapped installer. Added 120s timeout with proper error
   logging for each failure mode.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
